rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description text, confirmed by visual verification that there is no trailing hyphen (as in gpt-5-mini) and 'Arrearagia' is clearly read. Both extractors correctly identified it as a header with no amounts.
Amounts are in full consensus and visually correct. Selected gemini-flash for the more accurate and complete description 'Bensington - 1 1/2 yr' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Bensington - 1/2.'.
Full consensus across all fields, confirmed by visual verification. The notes for gpt-5-mini specifically identifying the 'ob' mark for the fraction are excellent.

Amounts are in full consensus and visually confirmed. Selected gemini-flash for the accurate description 'In Hewin Lodge', as gpt-5-mini's 'Treshwin' is incorrect. gpt-5-mini's note on the faint pence digit was a good observation but the reading '7' is clear upon visual inspection.

Visually identified description as 'Little Ews.' (correcting both extractors: gemini-flash had 'Ew.', gpt-5-mini had 'Cow.'). gpt-5-mini's classification as 'header' is more appropriate for its functional role as a subsection label without monetary amounts, despite being physically nested.
Amounts are in full consensus and visually correct. Selected gemini-flash for the accurate and complete description 'Taylor. 2 1/2 yrs' (gpt-5-mini missed '1/2').

Amounts are in full consensus and visually correct. Selected gemini-flash for the accurate description 'Judge' without a trailing hyphen (as in gpt-5-mini). gpt-5-mini's note on the halfpenny stroke shows good attention to detail.

Amounts are in full consensus and visually correct. Visually, 'Aitoms' from gemini-flash is a better reading of the description, particularly the initial 'A' and the distinct 't' character, though script is somewhat ambiguous (as noted by gemini-flash). A confidence of 0.9 reflects this slight ambiguity in the description.

Amounts are in full consensus and visually correct. Visually, 'Hartley.' from gpt-5-mini is a slightly better reading for the description, especially the 't' and 'ley' compared to 'Hardy' from gemini-flash. Both extractors correctly identified the 0.75 fraction, and gpt-5-mini noted an ink smudge near it.
Full consensus across all fields, confirmed by visual verification.

Amounts are in full consensus and visually correct. Selected gemini-flash's 'Worley' as a better reading of the parenthetical text. The punctuation for 'Busby. (Worley)' is also more accurately captured by gemini-flash, having a period after 'Busby' and no period after the closing parenthesis, as seen in the image (gpt-5-mini had 'Worby').

rows.description: Stipend or Quit Rent for Kidlington Vicarage
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's output. Visually, this is the first of two lines that are vertically braced together, and gemini-flash correctly extracted it as a distinct row. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this line with the subsequent line.

rows.description: vid. an: pro 24 Dec. Nov. 1818. Mem. +
rows.notes: This row was exclusively identified by gemini-flash. It visually appears as a distinct line on the ledger page, part of a two-line braced entry. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this with the previous row, leading to a missing row in its output. The reading of the text, including 'Nov.', is accurate upon visual inspection.
